completion_summary: Implemented raw-first legacy serious-v1 evidence digest verification with an audited Git-CRLF-only compatibility mode; added LF/CRLF and tamper regression coverage plus release documentation. Tests: 965 passed, 11 skipped full suite; 7 post-integration release tests passed; Ruff and mypy passed; candidate structural integrity passes while release_claim_allowed remains false and strict frozen verification still fails freshness as designed. Reference evidence: none required for byte-integrity repair. Known limitations: stale task/source/status/trajectory freshness is intentionally unresolved; no v0.1 evidence or manifest was rewritten. Implementation commit 44a9aa5; integration commit 29c1323.
scope: Make legacy serious-v1 embedded evidence digest verification portable across Git LF/CRLF checkout normalization without modifying frozen v0.1 evidence semantics; retain fail-closed content tamper detection and document the audited compatibility mode
